word.definition: Deepfake refers to an image or recording that has been convincingly altered and manipulated to misrepresent someone as doing or saying something that was not actually done or said.

sports_fact.text: The US women have won four World Cups — no other country, men's or women's side combined, has more than Brazil's five.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Rises at Start of Busy Week for Tech Stocks
market.summary: Samsung update, SK Hynix U.S. listing to test AI appetite; SpaceX joins Nasdaq-100 tomorrow

quote.text: All major religious traditions carry basically the same message, that is love, compassion and forgiveness … the important thing is they should be part of our daily lives.
quote.author: Tenzin Gyatso, 14th Dalai Lama

history.text: The Temple of Jupiter on the Capitoline Hill in Rome is burned down and the Sibylline books of prophecy destroyed with it.
